zh.lifeSummary: 當William Douglas 2nd of Drumlanrig於1395年出生在蘇格蘭度福利爾時，他的父親William Douglas 1st of Drumlanrig18歲，母親Elizabeth Stewart of Shambothy, Innermeath and Durisdeer21歲。他於1415年之前與Jane Maxwell of Caerlaverock結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1458年在英國蘇格蘭度福利爾享年63歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Douglas 2nd of Drumlanrig于1395年出生在苏格兰度福利爾时，他的父亲William Douglas 1st of Drumlanrig18岁，母亲Elizabeth Stewart of Shambothy, Innermeath and Durisdeer21岁。他于1415年之前与Jane Maxwell of Caerlaverock结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1458年在英国苏格兰度福利爾享年63岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Douglas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of various places called from their situation on a river named with Gaelic dubh ‘dark, black’ + glas ‘stream’ (a derivative of glas ‘blue’). There are several localities in Scotland and Ireland so named, but the one from which the surname is derived in most if not all cases is Douglas in Lanarkshire 20 miles south of Glasgow, the original stronghold of the influential Douglas family and their retainers.

History: The family taking their name from Douglas in Lanarkshire were of Flemish origin. They rose to great prominence in the 14th and 15th centuries, controlling the earldoms of Douglas, Morton, and Angus, and later, Queensberry.

variants.name: Douglass
meanings: Scottish and English (Durham and Northumbria): variant of   Douglas  .

History: William Douglass, a physician recognized for his identification and description of an epidemic of scarlet fever, was born c. 1691 in Gifford, Haddington County, Scotland, and settled in Boston in 1718. The abolitionist, orator, and journalist Frederick Douglass assumed the name after escaping from slavery in 1838 and traveling to Massachusetts. Son of a white father and a slave with some Indian blood, he was born Frederick Augustus Washington Bailey c. 1817 in Tuckahoe, MD.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Douglas 2nd of Drumlanrig was born in 1395, in Dumfriesshire, Scotland, his father, William Douglas 1st of Drumlanrig, was 18 and his mother, Elizabeth Stewart of Shambothy, Innermeath and Durisdeer, was 21. He married Jane Maxwell of Caerlaverock before 1415. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in 1458, in Dumfriesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 63, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Douglas 2nd of Drumlanrig est né en 1395, à Dumfriesshire, Écosse, son père, William Douglas 1st of Drumlanrig, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Stewart of Shambothy, Innermeath and Durisdeer, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Jane Maxwell of Caerlaverock avant 1415. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1458, à Dumfriesshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Douglas 2nd of Drumlanrig 1395 in Dumfriesshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Douglas 1st of Drumlanrig 18 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Stewart of Shambothy, Innermeath and Durisdeer 21. Er hat vor 1415 Jane Maxwell of Caerlaverock geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1458 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Dumfriesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Douglas 2nd of Drumlanrig è nato il nel 1395 nel Dumfriesshire, Scotland, il suo padre, William Douglas 1st of Drumlanrig, aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Stewart of Shambothy, Innermeath and Durisdeer, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Jane Maxwell of Caerlaverock prima del 1415. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1458, nel Dumfriesshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: William Douglas 2nd of Drumlanrigが1395年にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアで生まれた時，父William Douglas 1st of Drumlanrigは18歳，母Elizabeth Stewart of Shambothy, Innermeath and Durisdeerは21歳であった。1415年以前にJane Maxwell of Caerlaverockと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1458年にイギリススコットランドダムフリーシュアイアで63歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Douglas 2nd of Drumlanrig(이)가 1395년 스컷랜드 드프리실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Douglas 1st of Drumlanrig(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Stewart of Shambothy, Innermeath and Durisdeer(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1415년 이전 Jane Maxwell of Caerlaverock(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1458년 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리실르에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Douglas 2nd of Drumlanrig nasceu em 1395, em Dumfriesshire, Scotland, seu pai, William Douglas 1st of Drumlanrig, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Stewart of Shambothy, Innermeath and Durisdeer, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Jane Maxwell of Caerlaverock antes 1415. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1458, em Dumfriesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Douglas 2nd of Drumlanrig родился в 1395 г. в местности думфриессхир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени William Douglas 1st of Drumlanrig было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Stewart of Shambothy, Innermeath and Durisdeer, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane Maxwell of Caerlaverock перед 1415 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1458 г. в местности думфриессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Douglas 2nd of Drumlanrig nació en 1395, en Dumfriesshire, Scotland, su papá, William Douglas 1st of Drumlanrig, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Stewart of Shambothy, Innermeath and Durisdeer, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Jane Maxwell of Caerlaverock antes de 1415. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1458, en Dumfriesshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultado en Scotland.
